# data

**Instance Property**

The data representation of the receiver.

## Declaration

```swift
var data: Data! { get }
```

## Discussion

Can be used to save the web archive to a file, to put it on the pasteboard using the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebArchivePboardType] type, or used to initialize another web archive using the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebArchive/init(data:)] method.

## Getting attributes

- **mainResource**: The receiver’s main resource.
- **subresources**: The receiver’s subresources, or `nil` if there are none.
- **subframeArchives**: Archives representing the receiver’s subresources or `nil` if there are none.
